core_mechanism: maximum-entropy inference constrained to reproduce measured pairwise correlations, yielding a Boltzmann/Ising-type distribution over configurations governed by a Hamiltonian with pairwise couplings (the inverse problem of fitting pairwise interaction parameters to observed second-order statistics)
brief_reason: The abstract builds the joint state distribution by forcing a pairwise-correlation-constrained Hamiltonian and equivalently a maximum-entropy model matching observed pair correlations, showing these are the same pairwise-coupling machinery.
